summary: Completed all steps. Created geometry_error_handling.rs test file with FailingMockGeometryKernel and FailingExportMockGeometryKernel. Fixed Engine::build() to count total_ops and skip export when last_handle.is_none() && total_ops > 0, pushing a summary diagnostic instead. All 4 new tests pass (kernel failure, compile failure, export skip verification, no-realizations regression). All 140 tests across the crate pass with zero regressions.

Wrote consecutive_edit_param_only_reevaluates_affected_nodes test in incremental.rs. Test verifies: cold-start eval (volume=4e-5), first edit width→0.1 (volume=5e-5, eval_set={volume,C1}), second edit height→0.12 (volume=6e-5, eval_set={volume} only — C1 excluded proving no residual dirty state), snapshot provenance chain (ID=2, parent=1, changed={height}), all-Final freshness postcondition, pending_transition_count. Test passed immediately — no implementation changes needed. All 141 tests pass, zero regressions.

Fixed assertion_scope_mismatch per review feedback. Replaced fragile pending_transition_count assertion that derived expected count from last_eval_set() (post-cutoff actual_eval_set) with direct assertion against known constant 1, plus detailed comment explaining the semantic mismatch between pending_transition_count (full eval_set scope) and last_eval_set() (actual_eval_set scope). All 138 tests pass, zero regressions. All plan steps now complete.
